# Inventory Module

Module ID: inventory
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped inventory ledger with stock movements, reservations, deductions, reconciliation, and derived balances.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Owned tables: inventory_stock_movements, inventory_events
Primary use cases: stockIn, reserveStock, releaseReservation, deductStock, reconcileStock, getStockBalance, listStockMovements
Invariants: balances are derived from movement rows; quantities are safe integer numbers; source references dedupe movements per tenant/product/location/type; reservations and direct deductions reject insufficient available stock; releases and reserved deductions reject insufficient reserved stock; product IDs are accepted as foreign identities owned by product-catalog.
